content.en:
"Father!"

Ye Xingchen came to Ye Tian and said the treasure that Lin Lei had found.

"Oh, let me see the treasure land that makes you feel dangerous!"

Ye Tian followed Ye Xingchen to that place.

Using the way Lin Lei entered, the two entered.

"This treasure place is really hidden, I didn't even find it when I approached here, and that Lin Lei probably only discovered this place by chance. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he went deep into this treasure place to investigate the situation, and did not let his son follow.

......

As Ye Tian went deeper, a monster that resembled a snake but had tentacles attacked him.

The strength of this monster is not weak, it is equivalent to a stronger Eternal Dao Realm, but it is not as strong as a strong person who has cultivated into an Eternal Dao Species.

Through the probing of the copying talent, Ye Tian knew the name of this monster.

【Demon "640" Blood Bone Snake】

Ye Tian killed him with one blow, and then probed the situation of the opponent's body.

"Among them, how can there be some demon seed breath, but it is not a demon seed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he continued to go deeper, killing some of these creatures that contained the breath of demon seeds along the way.

And the resources he found along the way, he didn't bother to collect, they were of little use to him, but they should have a great attraction to other Eternal Dao realms.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the depths of this treasure land and found a strange giant tree, the giant tree was cracked, and a black and red heart grew inside, and his heart was still beating, and every beating transmitted a kind of aura similar to that of a demon seed.

It was this aura that infected those creatures.

Or rather, those creatures were born by this breath.

"What is this thing?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

As he approached the tree, it began to attack him.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian fought with this giant tree, and with his strong strength, he fought hard to break this giant tree.

Eventually, he pierced the giant tree and removed its inner heart.

After the heart was removed, the giant tree fell completely and died.

Seeing this heart, he remembered the evil vine, these two things should not be the same kind, it seems to be a little similar!

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately put this heart into his Eternal Dao Seed to see the situation.

Rumble!!!!

The heart is placed into the Eternal Dao Seed, and gradually begins to merge with the Eternal Dao Seed, but its effect is different from the Evil Punishment Vine, which is to enhance the Eternal Dao Seed, and this heart only faintly improves the Eternal Dao Seed, and he is more of an energy integrated into the Eternal Dao Body.

From this, it can be seen that the value of this heart should be inferior to that of the evil vine.

After all, a strong person with a perfect Eternal Dao Body, or a strong person who has surpassed the Eternal Dao Realm, does not need to ascend to the Eternal Dao Body, and this heart will be of little use to them, far less valuable than the Evil Vine.

Of course.

Ye Tian still needs this thing very much.

"I don't know the name of this heart, so let's name it the Tree Heart Demon Seed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

After that, he explored this treasure land, and there were indeed a lot of resources, but it was also suitable for those powerhouses of the Eternal Dao Body, which would not help him much.

However, he still killed the powerful creatures here, so that there is no threat to his son and them, let them come here and slowly collect resources!

Wow!

Ye Tian came to Ye Xingchen's side.

"Father, are you done exploring?" Ye Xingchen asked.

"Hmm!" Ye Tian nodded, "There are a lot of resources here, but they don't help me much, I have killed all the powerful creatures, and there is no threat to you." You can slowly collect resources here in the future, and the biggest gain here should be this. "

Ye Tian took out the heart from the Eternal Dao Seed: "I call this thing the Tree Heart Demon Seed, for the Eternal Dao Realm of the Imperfect Dao Seed, it is a disaster, and it will make them demonized, but for the Eternal Dao Realm where we have cultivated the Perfect Eternal Dao Seed, it is a treasure, and it can improve the Eternal Dao Seed and the Eternal Dao Body." When I raise the Eternal Dao Body to the Perfection Realm, I will give it to you when the time comes, and when you are done, I will give it to your mother and sister. "

Ye Xingchen was pleasantly surprised, there were such treasures.

In this way, it would be easy for him to ascend to the Eternal Dao Body!

"Father, this treasure was discovered by Lin Lei, how much contribution should be given?" Ye Xingchen asked.

One million contribution value, this contribution value is not low!

Contribution points in the Endless Realm are hard to come by, and the bar is very high.

For example, the Endless Dao Seed, it only takes 200,000 contribution points to exchange it, and you can imagine how many good things one million contribution is worth exchanging.

"Yes!"

Ye Xingchen replied.......

Subsequently.

They went out.

Ye Tian was not afraid that the Tree Heart Demon Seed would be discovered for the time being, so he put it on his body, after all, the Great Masters of the Ten Thousand Gods had already left here, and he did not have the strength to surpass the Eternal Dao Realm, so it was not easy to find out the situation inside his Eternal Dao Seed even if he was face-to-face.

......

Return to the capital of the Endless Realm.

Ye Tian went to cultivate, and Ye Xingchen contacted Lin Lei.

Soon, Lin Lei came to Ye Xingchen.

"Star Hall Master!"

Lin Lei said respectfully.

"Lin Lei, my father has probed and is ready to give you 1 million contribution points!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"1,000,000 Contribution Value !!!"

Lin Lei was shocked.

He thought that it would be very good to give a contribution of more than 100,000 at most, and with his own accumulation, he might be able to make up 200,000 contribution points and exchange them for endless Dao inheritance.

As a result, he didn't expect that the Terran Temple was so generous and gave him 1 million contribution points in one go.

"Thank you, Lord of the Star Palace!"

Lin Lei was grateful.

Soon, 1 million contribution value arrived.

Lin Lei immediately went to exchange for the Endless Dao Inheritance, and then came to the depths of the Terran Temple, where he received the Endless Dao Inheritance.

And before receiving the lineage, you need to make a vow.

Soon, the oath was made, and Lin Lei officially accepted the Endless Dao Inheritance.

After a long time.

The Endless Dao Inheritance has all been accepted.

Then, Lin Lei showed an incredible look.

"It turns out that 4.7 is a high-level eternal Dao !!!!"

He was shocked.

He had heard that many of the country lords were only cultivating the middle Eternal Dao species!

The high-level Eternal Dao Seed is extremely rare, the value is too high, and the probability of Demon Seed Transformation is very small, as long as you don't die, and you don't take some resources to increase Demon Seed, you can almost smoothly cultivate to the Eternal Dao Body Perfection Realm.

"200,000 contribution points can be exchanged for the inheritance of the high-level Eternal Dao species, which is too cheap, and if it is exchanged for other forces, it is impossible to obtain the inheritance of the high-level Eternal Dao species!"

Lin Lei was extremely glad that he had handed over the treasure land, otherwise he would not have been able to obtain the Endless Dao Seed Inheritance so quickly.

Compared to the Endless Dao Inheritance, the Inferior Eternal Dao Inheritance he obtained before was simply a spicy chicken!

"Go back and immediately cultivate the Endless Dao Seed!"

Lin Lei said excitedly.
